title: pleurospermum simplex
intro: Pleurospermum simplex is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve pain, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits associated with Pleurospermum simplex include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. Pleurospermum simplex is commonly prepared as a tincture or infusion for herbal remedies, although its use should be supervised by a healthcare professional due to limited research and potential side effects.
